training_status: walking 6,000-10,000 steps daily, no weight training

benefits.description: Appetite suppression stronger on injection day but fades by the next day; splitting into twice-weekly helped maintain more stable suppression throughout the week

protocol_notes: Currently on 7.5mg Zepbound pen (3.75mg twice weekly) for 4 weeks. Weight has stalled at 215 lbs for 8 weeks despite 1,800 calories/day and 6,000-10,000 steps/day. Medication sourced from Walmart.
